recommendations.title: Project A
recommendations.overview: In late 19th century Hong Kong, the British may rule the land, but the pirates rule the waters. Coast Guard officer Dragon Ma is determined that his beloved Coast Guard will not be made a fool of.

recommendations.title: The Substance
recommendations.overview: A fading celebrity decides to use a black market drug, a cell-replicating substance that temporarily creates a younger, better version of herself.

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Not Suitable For Children
recommendations.overview: A young playboy who learns he has one month until he becomes infertile sets out to procreate as much as possible.
